name: hackathon-project
description: Hackathon project with multiple stack options

scripts.setup: npm run setup:frontend && npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:nextjs && npm run setup:python
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:nextjs"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && npm run build:nextjs
